name: Chicken Maque Choux
recipeIngredient: 1 each Large onion, finely chopped (1/2 ea Bell pepper, chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the kernels off the cob and scrape the ears with the back of a knife to obtain the milky pulp in a heavy iron pot.
2. Brown the chicken in oil, a few pieces at a time, until all sides are browned.
3. Add the corn, onions, and the rest of the ingredients (tomato pieces, salt, sugar, black pepper) to the pot.
4. Stir the mixture frequently while cooking over low flame for 30 minutes.
5. If the mixture is too dry, add a small amount of milk.
6. This recipe will serve four people.
